fn build_report(items: &[u32]) -> String {
    let mut output = String::new();
    for item in items {
        use std::fmt::Write;
        write!(output, "item: {}\n", item).unwrap();
    }
    output
}

fn render_csv(rows: &[(&str, &str)]) -> String {
    let mut buf = String::new();
    for (key, val) in rows {
        use std::fmt::Write;
        writeln!(buf, "{},{}", key, val).unwrap();
    }
    buf
}
